# Support for the Theme

We use GitHub for tracking bugs, feature requests and the discussions area.

## Issue Tracking

You can find our open issues (bugs and requests) on [GitHub](https://github.com/andrewgjohnson/open-source-documentation-jekyll-theme/issues).

## Discussions Area

You can find our discussions area on [GitHub](https://github.com/andrewgjohnson/open-source-documentation-jekyll-theme/discussions).

## Financial Support

You can financially support the theme on [Patreon](https://patreon.com/agjopensource).
